99.reason: // This while loop never checks if list->n is greater than listc->n, so nodes with higher exponents than the head cannot be inserted before the head, violating descending order.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 1.0 , reason:  // This while loop never checks if list->n is greater than listc->n, so nodes with higher exponents than the head cannot be inserted before the head, violating descending order.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Does not handle insertion before head node (when list->n > listc->n)
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [Error] The loop condition only checks `p->link`, ignoring the head node `p`. This fails to insert larger exponents at the front or merge with the head.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  Fails to handle the case where list->n equals listc->n (head node), causing duplicate terms instead of merging. Also fails to insert at the head if list->n > listc->n.
